allowedHosts.description: Hostnames the watchers are permitted to connect to. Must be explicitly configured — no hosts are allowed by default.

localDispatchBase.description: Base URL for internal webhook dispatch

dispatchAuthToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating webhook dispatch requests

hookSessionKey.description: Deprecated alias for hookSessionPrefix. Sentinel always appends watcher/group segments to prevent a shared global callback session.

hookSessionPrefix.description: Base session key prefix used for isolated /hooks/sentinel callback sessions (default: agent:main:hooks:sentinel)

hookSessionGroup.description: Optional default session group key. When set, callbacks without explicit hookSessionGroup are routed to this group session.

hookRelayDedupeWindowMs.description: Suppress duplicate relay messages for the same dedupe key within this window (milliseconds)

stateFilePath.description: Custom path for the sentinel state persistence file

notificationPayloadMode.description: Controls delivery-target notifications: none (suppress message fan-out), concise relay text (default), or relay text with debug envelope payload

maxWatchersTotal.description: Maximum total watchers across all skills

maxIntervalMsFloor.description: Minimum allowed polling interval in milliseconds

allowedHosts.label: Allowed Hosts
allowedHosts.help: Hostnames the watchers are permitted to connect to

localDispatchBase.label: Dispatch Base URL
localDispatchBase.help: Base URL for internal webhook dispatch

dispatchAuthToken.label: Dispatch Auth Token
dispatchAuthToken.help: Bearer token for webhook dispatch authentication

hookSessionKey.label: Hook Session Key (Deprecated)
hookSessionKey.help: Deprecated alias for hookSessionPrefix. Sentinel appends watcher/group segments automatically.

hookSessionPrefix.label: Hook Session Prefix
hookSessionPrefix.help: Base prefix for isolated callback sessions (default: agent:main:hooks:sentinel)

hookSessionGroup.label: Default Hook Session Group
hookSessionGroup.help: Optional default group key for callback sessions. Watchers with the same group share one isolated session.

hookRelayDedupeWindowMs.label: Hook Relay Dedupe Window (ms)
hookRelayDedupeWindowMs.help: Suppress duplicate relay messages with the same dedupe key for this many milliseconds

stateFilePath.label: State File Path
stateFilePath.help: Custom path for sentinel state persistence file

notificationPayloadMode.label: Notification Payload Mode
notificationPayloadMode.help: Choose none (suppress delivery-target messages), concise relay text (default), or include debug envelope payload

limits.maxWatchersTotal.label: Max Watchers
limits.maxWatchersTotal.help: Maximum total watchers across all skills

limits.maxWatchersPerSkill.label: Max Per Skill
limits.maxWatchersPerSkill.help: Maximum watchers a single skill can create

limits.maxIntervalMsFloor.label: Min Poll Interval (ms)
limits.maxIntervalMsFloor.help: Minimum allowed polling interval in milliseconds
